name: WeeklyReportGenerator
description: Generate weekly reports from work logs and export to DingTalk AI table via DingTalkCLI.
author: VCP Team

DINGTALK_TABLE_UUID.description: Legacy fallback AI table UUID for DingTalkTable export

DINGTALK_BASE_ID.description: Preferred DWS AI table base_id for DingTalkCLI record create

DINGTALK_TABLE_ID.description: Preferred DWS AI table table_id for DingTalkCLI record create

DINGTALK_WEEKLY_TABLE_WRITE_TOOL.description: DWS aitable command path used by export_to_table

DWS_GRAY_STAGE.description: Gray stage policy inherited by weekly export: query_only/low_risk_write/full_write

invocationCommands.description: Generate weekly report from local work logs.
Generate weekly report from diary/worklog source.
Export report content to DingTalk AI table via DingTalkCLI (fallback DingTalkTable).
